title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: tests/test_memory_phase4.py (第 1 至 164 行，共 164 行) ---
   1 | """阶段4：统一检索层与 Hybrid Recall 测试。"""
   2 | 
   3 | from __future__ import annotations
   4 | 
   5 | from datetime import datetime, timedelta
   6 | 
   7 | from core.memory_items import MemoryItem, MemoryKind
   8 | from core.memory_manager import MemoryManager
   9 | from core.memory_models import ErrorRecord, FileChange, SessionSummary
  10 | from core.memory_retrieval import MemoryDocument
  11 | from tools import get_default_tools
  12 | from tools.memory_tool import MemoryErrorHistoryTool, MemoryFileHistoryTool
  13 | 
  14 | 
  15 | def _summary(session_id: str, goal: str, text: str, file_path: str, error_type: str = "") -> SessionSummary:
  16 |     errors = []
  17 |     if error_type:
  18 |         errors.append(ErrorRecord(
  19 |             error_type=error_type,
  20 |             error_message=f"{error_type}: import failed in {file_path}",
  21 |             timestamp=datetime.now().isoformat(),
  22 |             file_path=file_path,
  23 |             solution="补充缺失依赖并重新运行 pytest",
  24 |             resolved=True,
  25 |         ))
  26 |     return SessionSummary(
  27 |         session_id=session_id,
  28 |         timestamp=(datetime.now() - timedelta(days=1)).isoformat(),
  29 |         summary_text=text,
  30 |         task_goal=goal,
  31 |         task_status="completed",
  32 |         files_changed=[FileChange(path=file_path, action="modified", summary=text, importance=0.8)],
  33 |         errors_encountered=errors,
  34 |         key_decisions=["统一使用 MemoryRetriever.hybrid_recall"],
  35 |         importance=0.7,
  36 |     )
  37 | 
  38 | 
  39 | def test_hybrid_recall_unifies_memory_items_and_session_summaries(tmp_path):
  40 |     manager = MemoryManager(long_term_storage_dir=str(tmp_path / "long_term"))
  41 |     summary = _summary(
  42 |         "s1",
  43 |         "修复检索工具",
  44 |         "SearchMemoryTool 需要接入统一 Hybrid Recall 检索层",
  45 |         "tools/retrieval_tool.py",
  46 |     )
  47 |     manager.save_summary(summary)
  48 |     manager.save_memory_item(MemoryItem(
  49 |         kind=MemoryKind.ARCHITECTURE.value,
  50 |         title="Hybrid Recall 架构",
  51 |         content="MemoryRetriever 将 MemoryItem 与 SessionSummary 统一为 MemoryDocument 后加权排序。",
  52 |         files=["core/memory_retrieval.py"],
  53 |         concepts=["hybrid", "recall", "MemoryDocument"],
  54 |         importance=0.95,
  55 |     ))
  56 | 
  57 |     results = manager.hybrid_recall("Hybrid Recall MemoryRetriever", top_k=5)
  58 | 
  59 |     assert len(results) >= 2
  60 |     assert all(isinstance(result.item, MemoryItem) for result in results)
  61 |     assert results[0].item.title == "Hybrid Recall 架构"
  62 |     assert results[0].source in {"memory_item", "long_term_memory_item", "long_term_items"}
  63 |     assert any(result.item.kind == MemoryKind.SUMMARY.value for result in results)
  64 |     assert all(result.reason for result in results)
  65 | 
  66 | 
  67 | def test_memory_document_from_summary_preserves_file_error_metadata():
  68 |     summary = _summary(
  69 |         "s_error",
  70 |         "修复 pytest 导入错误",
  71 |         "pytest 运行失败，原因是 ModuleNotFoundError，需要调整依赖。",
  72 |         "tests/test_memory_phase4.py",
  73 |         "ModuleNotFoundError",
  74 |     )
  75 | 
  76 |     document = MemoryDocument.from_session_summary(summary, source_type="episodic")
  77 | 
  78 |     assert document.source_type == "episodic"
  79 |     assert document.files == ["tests/test_memory_phase4.py"]
  80 |     assert "ModuleNotFoundError" in document.error_types
  81 |     assert "pytest" in document.content
  82 |     assert document.to_memory_item().kind == MemoryKind.SUMMARY.value
  83 | 
  84 | 
  85 | def test_file_history_recall_weights_exact_file_match(tmp_path):
  86 |     manager = MemoryManager(long_term_storage_dir=str(tmp_path / "long_term"))
  87 |     manager.save_memory_item(MemoryItem(
  88 |         kind=Mem...
